---
title: "*The Isochronicles: This First Law Saga Is a Gas* (The 1^st^ Law for Ideal Gases) Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *The Isochronicles: This First Law Saga Is a Gas*

Main title explanation

## The Isochronicles: This First Law Saga Is a Gas

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/iKsR3v1wu30?si=jNOfKbT6n2jMDehd" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

## Definitions

[Isothermal Process](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isothermal_process)
: A constant-temperature process, $\Delta T = 0$.

[Isobaric Process](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isobaric_process)
: A constant-pressure process, $\Delta P = 0$.

[Isochoric Process](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isochoric_process)
: A constant-volume process, $\Delta V = 0$.

[Isentropic Process](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isentropic_process)
: A constant-entropy process, $\Delta S = 0$. Clausius used the term to mean adiabatic and reversible and almost all thermodynamics texts use the word in the same sense.

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**Dry Bulbs, Wet Bulbs, and My Will to Live: Mastering the Psych Chart**<br/>*Psychrometric Charts*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Nz8ADo4X2Ss), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/PsychrometricChartsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/97-PsychrometiricChartVIsuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**Reference Not Found: Mixing, Dissolving, and Changing the Rules**<br/>*$\Delta H_m$, $\Delta H_s$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ggU692PLWts), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/HeatsOfMixingVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/98-ReferenceStatesVIsuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Germain Hess and the Enthalpy of Doom**<br/>*Hess's Law and $\Delta \hat{H}^\circ_f$, $\Delta \hat{H}^\circ_r$, and $\Delta \hat{H}c$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/qdgH4v64vOQ), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/HeatsOfFormationAndReactionVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/104-HeatsOfReactionVisuals.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**Chemical Reactions vs. The First Law: Who Wins?**<br/>*Forms of the 1^st^ Law for Chemical Reactions*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/mFF5hDHclPE), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/The1stLawReactingSystems.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/106-1stLawReactingVisuals.qmd)
